name: broker-correction-30pct-discrepant-with-doc
rationale: Broker correction asserts loan_amount $290k; loan_application doc shows $180k (>30% discrepancy). F1.LA Layer 1 (R11-B-1) detects >30% discrepancy + SUPPRESSES loan_app source from canonical_map. F2.DH discrepancyHold ACTIVATES. Tests the suppression mechanic at its exact >30% threshold (vs A08 which was >50%).
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A08 (>50% discrepancy) — F10 isolates the >30% threshold edge case.
